keyword: dog activity monitor for weight loss
title: Dog Activity Monitor for Weight Loss (Track & Trim)
meta: Activity trackers that help overweight dogs slim down with goals and trends.
intro: An activity monitor turns 'is my dog getting enough exercise' into numbers you can act on.

sections.body: Some apps set a daily activity goal; use it to ramp walks gradually.
Pair with portion control — exercise alone won't fix overfeeding.
Light collar mount so the dog actually wears it daily.

faq.a: No — weight loss is mostly food; tracker verifies exercise.
Estimates; use as trends not absolutes.
